---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement
Describe the current limitation or pain point.

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
List alternatives you considered.

## Use Case
Explain why this matters and who benefits.

## Additional Context
Mockups, links, examples, or references.
